name: TandT 250628b2d2 SpecLang
description:
An interesting version that is corrupted and I want to export the specs.
A sophisticated decision-making and performance review application that implements systematic evaluation methodologies. Users can create digital thinking models, compare elements in a pairwise fashion to establish a hierarchy of importance, and analyze specific scenarios against these models to arrive at structured, data-driven decisions. The app features optional, robust AI-powered assistance for generating ideas and summarizing results.
